key_matching_strengths: 20+ years of enterprise data architecture experience with global financial institutions (Barclays, NBIM, Aberdeen, Novo Nordisk, XL Axiata)
Expertise in cloud data modernization (Azure, AWS, Snowflake, Databricks Lakehouse)
Strong background in data governance, medallion architecture, CDC pipelines, and real-time data processing
Proven leadership in managing global cross-functional teams (up to 60+ engineers)
Experience with T+1 reconciliation platforms, SWIFT MT processing, and automated exception management
Certifications in AWS, Databricks, Scrum Master, and Generative AI/Agentic AI
Domain expertise in capital markets, asset management, sovereign wealth funds, and pharma supply chain
Key achievements in petabyte-scale migrations, performance optimization, and cost savings
key_gaps: No explicit mention of experience with specific compliance frameworks (e.g., GDPR, CCPA) which may be required for some roles
Limited detail on hands-on experience with specific AI/ML models or generative AI implementations beyond architecture
No mention of experience with specific data governance tools (e.g., Collibra, Alation) beyond Erwin and Unity Catalog
No explicit experience with blockchain or distributed ledger technologies which may be relevant for some financial roles
ats_keywords_missing: Regulatory Reporting (e.g., MiFID II, Basel III)

resume_tailoring_suggestions.suggestion: Add 1-2 lines explicitly mentioning experience with AI/ML pipelines, generative AI applications, or compliance frameworks if the role emphasizes these areas. Highlight leadership in data modernization and cloud-native analytics ecosystems.

Include keywords like 'Data Mesh', 'Data Fabric', 'LLM', 'Vector Search', or 'Regulatory Reporting' if the JD emphasizes these areas. Add 'Agile Program Delivery' and 'Vendor Management' if not already present.
Add 1-2 bullet points highlighting specific AI/ML or compliance-related achievements, such as implementing generative AI for data quality or ensuring regulatory compliance in data models.

tailored_summary_rewrite: Enterprise Data Architect with 20+ years of experience designing and modernizing cloud-native data platforms for global financial institutions, sovereign wealth funds, and enterprise organizations. Expertise in Databricks Lakehouse, Snowflake, and Azure/AWS architectures, with a proven track record in petabyte-scale migrations, medallion architecture, and real-time reconciliation platforms. Led cross-functional teams of 60+ engineers to deliver governed, scalable data ecosystems supporting investment banking, asset management, and supply chain analytics.
overall_reasoning: The candidate demonstrates a strong match with 85% alignment to the JD, with extensive experience in cloud data modernization, enterprise architecture, and leadership in financial domains. Key strengths include expertise in Databricks, Snowflake, Azure/AWS, and real-time data processing, along with proven achievements in cost savings, performance optimization, and team leadership. Gaps are minor and primarily revolve around specific compliance frameworks, AI/ML implementations, or newer data architecture paradigms like Data Mesh. The resume is well-structured and highlights quantifiable impacts, making this a 'Strong Apply' scenario with minimal tailoring required.
